Class Board

java.lang.Object
it.polimi.ingsw.am22.model.Board
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class Board extends Object implements Serializable
The shared game board: the two rows of cards on offer (upper and lower), the TurnOrderTile, and the offer track of OfferTiles. It owns the card-flow logic for the opening deal, round-end maintenance and refilling.
See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • Board

      public Board(int numPlayers)
      Parameters:
      numPlayers - the number of players (the rows and tracks are populated later by initTrack(int) and dealInitialCards(List, int))

  • Method Details

    • initTrack

      public void initTrack(int numPlayers)
      (Re)builds the offer track for the given number of players and sorts the tiles by letter. Extra tiles are unlocked for 3, 4 and 5 players.
      Parameters:
      numPlayers - the number of players

    • dealInitialCards

      public void dealInitialCards(List<Card> tribeDeck, int numPlayers)
      Deals the opening rows. The lower row receives numPlayers + 1 non-Event cards; any Event drawn while filling it is diverted to the upper row. The upper row is then topped up to numPlayers + 4 cards (counting any Event already moved there).
      Parameters:
      tribeDeck - the deck to draw from (mutated)
      numPlayers - the number of players

    • clearLowerRow

      public void clearLowerRow()
      Removes from the lower row the cards that do not survive the round end.

    • clearLowerBuildings

      public void clearLowerBuildings()
      Removes from the lower row the cards (buildings) destroyed at the start of Era III.

    • shiftUpToLow

      public void shiftUpToLow()
      Moves the non-surviving cards from the upper row down to the lower row.

    • shiftBuildingsDown

      public void shiftBuildingsDown()
      Moves the surviving cards (buildings) from the upper row down to the lower row.

    • refillUpperRow

      public Era refillUpperRow(List<Card> tribeDeck, Era currentEra)
      Refills the upper row from the deck after a round. Normally draws enough cards to refill; but if fewer than that many cards would remain afterwards, the whole deck is drained instead, so the two Final Event cards at the bottom always surface before the last round.
      Parameters:
      tribeDeck - the deck to draw from (mutated)
      currentEra - the current Era
      Returns:
      the (possibly advanced) Era implied by the cards drawn

    • revealNewBuildings

      public void revealNewBuildings(List<it.polimi.ingsw.am22.model.building.Building> newBuildings)
      Reveals new buildings by appending them to the upper row.
      Parameters:
      newBuildings - the buildings to reveal

    • getUpperRow

      public List<Card> getUpperRow()
      Returns:
      the upper row of cards

    • getLowerRow

      public List<Card> getLowerRow()
      Returns:
      the lower row of cards

      public TurnOrderTile getTurnOrderTile()

      the turn-order tile

      public List<OfferTile> getOfferTrack()
      Returns:

    • getTotemsOnOffersCount

      public int getTotemsOnOffersCount()
      Returns:
      how many offer tiles are currently occupied by a totem
